examples: Outside the fence, hawkers had dripping bags of sachet water for sale; a few sold dead-looking loaves of bread and fried buns.
The boys went through two whole loaves of bread.
Here are two loaves and a ham for you, so that you won't starve.
They grab bottles of water and loaves of bread from volunteers as they head out.
Christ might have said this when he performed the miracle of the loaves and fishes.
